data.description: The S&P 500 is frequently viewed as a barometer for the overall health of the US stock market by analysts, journalists, and investors. With the recent market momentum, crypto indexes will soon be held in the same regard.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP Plunge Over 6% Each, Dogecoin Drowns 14% On Turbulent Post-FOMC Thursday
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets are trading lower on Thursday, with Bitcoin falling below the $100,000 mark following Wednesday’s Fed meeting.
